headline: Hormel Foods Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, today announced its quarterly dividend on the common stock, authorized by the Board of Directors at 29.25 cents ($0.2925) a share on March 23, 2026, will be paid May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record at the close of business on April 13, 2026.
